name: Vitello Alla Francese (Batter Fried)
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss the veal scallops with salt and pepper.
2. In a bowl, mix egg, milk, remaining salt, and pepper.
3. Dredge each scallop in flour on both sides.
4. Melt butter in a heavy skillet. Add scallops and cook 2 minutes per side,
or until golden brown.
5. Remove the veal. Pour lemon juice into the skillet.
6. Garnish with lemon slices and sprinkle with parsley.
7. Serve with Spaghetti with Marinara Sauce.
